items.title: A cool prompt on Seedance 2 : The shot opens tight on a beautiful woman face, wind tearing at he
items.description: A cool prompt on Seedance 2 : The shot opens tight on a beautiful woman face, wind tearing at her coat as she stands on a jagged cliff. The camera eases over her shoulder and tilts down, following her line of sight. We d
items.prompt: A cool prompt on Seedance 2 : The shot opens tight on a beautiful woman face, wind tearing at her coat as she stands on a jagged cliff. The camera eases over her shoulder and tilts down, following her line of sight. We descend past the crumbling lip into the void, the frame widening to reveal cliffs dropping away. The ocean roars into view, violent surf detonating against rock. The move continues into a high overhead, locking into an aerial top-down that frames the lone figure at the precipice as waves explode below. An interesting observation is that Seedance 2 appears to miss the intended context of the word “tearing” in the output. When a word has multiple meanings, there is a good chance the model may misinterpret it and generate a different result. Generated on @runwayml

items.prompt: CAPCUT SEEDANCE 2.0 İLE BU VİDEOYU OLUŞTURDUM. Toplam maliyetim: 660 kredi. Ve dürüst olmam gerekirse... Buna fazlasıyla değdi. Birkaç yıl önce böyle bir video üretmek için ihtiyacın olan şeyler: Büyük bir prodüksiyon ekibi Sinematik VFX uzmanları Haftalar süren kurgu Binlerce dolarlık bütçe Bugün ise... Doğru prompt. Doğru referans görseller. Ve güçlü bir AI video modelini @capcutapp sayesinde oluşturdum. Bu videoda: Sinematik kamera hareketleri Film kalitesinde ışıklandırma Gerçekçi karakter animasyonları Epik atmosfer Oyun fragmanı kalitesinde sahneler tamamen yapay zeka tarafından üretildi. 660 kredi kulağa pahalı gelebilir. Ama aynı kaliteyi geleneksel yöntemlerle üretmeye çalışsaydım, maliyet bunun kat kat üzerinde olurdu. Bence artık rekabet, kim daha iyi kurgu yapıyor değil. Kim yapay zekaya daha iyi yönetmenlik yapıyor. 2026'da içerik üreticilerinin en değerli becerisi kamera kullanmak olmayacak. Doğru prompt yazmak olacak. Ve bu daha yolun başı. Kullandığım promptu aşağıya bırakıyorum.

items.title: Cinematic Vertical AI Video made using Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic sto
items.description: Cinematic Vertical AI Video made using Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic storytelling, seamless transitions, Hollywood-quality VFX, dramatic lighting, premium sci-fi aesthetic, smooth camera movement,
items.prompt: Cinematic Vertical AI Video made using Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic storytelling, seamless transitions, Hollywood-quality VFX, dramatic lighting, premium sci-fi aesthetic, smooth camera movement, photorealistic details. 0–3s: Pre-dawn inside a luxurious modern loft apartment. A minimalist smart alarm clock activates, projecting soft holographic notifications above a floating bedside shelf. A beautiful East Asian woman with long black hair, wearing an oversized cream knit sleep shirt, lies comfortably under a warm blanket. She slowly opens her eyes, glances at the floating alerts, dismisses them with a sleepy hand gesture, turns over, and falls back asleep. 3–6s: Close-up on her peaceful face. Tiny glowing particles begin drifting through the room. The blanket gradually transforms into a luminous fabric threaded with flowing light. Furniture subtly lifts from the floor as gravity seems to weaken. The walls dissolve into elegant geometric patterns while hidden metallic structures emerge beneath the bed, assembling into a sophisticated levitation platform. 6–9s: The bed gently rises into the air. Rings of glowing energy rotate beneath it, creating a mesmerizing anti-gravity effect. Above, the ceiling unfolds like a giant mechanical iris, revealing a brilliant sunrise sky. The floating bed ascends upward through the opening and emerges high above a futuristic cloud-covered metropolis filled with glass towers and floating architecture. 9–12s: Epic aerial tracking shots. The bed glides effortlessly between soaring skyscrapers, floating gardens, suspended transit routes, and massive sky bridges. Golden sunlight reflects across the futuristic city while clouds drift below. The woman remains peacefully asleep as the camera circles the bed in sweeping cinematic movements. 12–15s: The bed approaches a breathtaking floating botanical sanctuary above the clouds. As it lands, the glowing technology elegantly transforms into blooming metallic flowers. The woman slowly awakens, sits up, and looks around in wonder. The camera pulls back to reveal the vast floating city, endless clouds, and a spectacular sunrise stretching across the horizon. Ultra-cinematic final frame, soft lens flare, fade to white.

items.title: Seedance 2.0 4K on Higgsfield Prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic lifestyle video featur
items.description: Seedance 2.0 4K on Higgsfield Prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic lifestyle video featuring the same young woman throughout the entire sequence. Maintain perfect identity consistency across every shot, preserving
items.prompt: Seedance 2.0 4K on Higgsfield Prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic lifestyle video featuring the same young woman throughout the entire sequence. Maintain perfect identity consistency across every shot, preserving identical facial features, hairstyle, body proportions, skin tone, outfit, accessories, and overall appearance. She wears a white ribbed crop top, beige cotton shorts, white ankle socks, and a messy high ponytail. The setting is a bright, modern apartment filled with warm golden morning sunlight, wooden furniture, soft neutral décor, large windows with sheer curtains, and abundant indoor plants, creating a calm Scandinavian-inspired atmosphere. The video begins with her naturally waking up beside her bed. She stretches gently as soft golden sunlight pours through the sheer curtains. She smiles peacefully, takes a deep breath, and walks into the bathroom. Inside the bathroom, she gently washes her face before beginning her complete skincare routine in front of the mirror. She carefully applies serum, massages moisturizer into her skin with slow circular motions, and admires her healthy natural glow with a relaxed smile. She then walks into the living room, picks up a cordless vacuum cleaner, and begins cleaning the apartment. While vacuuming, she playfully dances around the room, laughing naturally and enjoying the quiet morning. Sunlight streams through the large windows, casting soft realistic shadows across the wooden floor. Next, she opens the sliding balcony door and steps outside carrying a watering can. She carefully waters rows of colorful flower pots and lush green plants. She gently touches the petals and leaves while enjoying the peaceful morning breeze. Butterflies flutter nearby as warm sunlight illuminates the flowers. After finishing, she prepares a large iced coffee and sits comfortably on a balcony chair surrounded by blooming plants. She quietly enjoys the panoramic city skyline, closes her eyes for a moment to feel the warm breeze, then notices the camera. She smiles softly, raises her coffee toward the lens in a friendly toast, and relaxes as the camera slowly pulls back to reveal the peaceful balcony garden bathed in morning light. Audio should consist only of natural ambient sounds: birds chirping, a gentle breeze, distant city ambience, footsteps, running water, vacuum cleaner sounds, leaves rustling, water pouring onto plants, and ice softly clinking inside the coffee. No background music. No subtitles, logos, watermarks, captions, or on-screen text. Premium commercial-quality cinematography with smooth handheld lifestyle camera movement, realistic skin texture, natural facial expressions, subtle eye movement, detailed hair physics, physically accurate global illumination, cinematic depth of field, soft volumetric morning light, warm golden-hour atmosphere, HDR color grading, ultra-photorealistic rendering, and 16:9 widescreen composition.

items.title: A gentle reminder to everyone 🍃 Made with Seedance 2.0 on @PixVerse Prompt: 15-second cinematic
items.description: A gentle reminder to everyone 🍃 Made with Seedance 2.0 on @PixVerse_ Prompt: 15-second cinematic TV show style video. Use (reference) as the background location (handcrafted cardboard cutout theatrical forest stage set
items.prompt: A gentle reminder to everyone 🍃 Made with Seedance 2.0 on @PixVerse_ Prompt: 15-second cinematic TV show style video. Use (reference) as the background location (handcrafted cardboard cutout theatrical forest stage set with painted trees, oversized mushrooms, stone path, and soft lighting). The character (reference) (tarsier mascot costume) enters from the left side and walks slowly toward the right side of the frame on the stone path. At 3 seconds, the mascot stops in the middle of the path, turns to face the camera, raises his right hand and points directly at the camera. With a calm, slow, and warm voice he says: "Hey, you... yes you." Then continues speaking: "Don't tell your dreams to everybody around." After the first line, he lowers his hand and continues walking slowly toward the right side of the frame. A single realistic iron park swing appears naturally on the right side of the path. The mascot walks up to the swing, turns around, and sits down on it. At 11 seconds, the camera slowly and smoothly zooms in on the mascot sitting on the swing. While sitting, he looks at the camera again with a calm expression and says in a soft, motivational tone: "Some people smile but wanna see you down." The mascot's mouth does not move when speaking (mascot costume limitation). Only natural sound effects — soft footsteps on the stone path and the gentle creaking sound of the iron swing when he sits. No background music. Background remains in handcrafted cardboard cutout theatrical style, not 3D. Camera movement is smooth and realistic like a TV show or documentary. Soft natural lighting, calm and motivational atmosphere. --ar 16:9 --duration 15

items.title: AI video generation gets much easier when you stop treating audio as an afterthought. A workflow
items.description: AI video generation gets much easier when you stop treating audio as an afterthought. A workflow I’ve been exploring: 1. Create the complete soundtrack with Seed-Audio 1.0. 2. Use that audio to drive the visuals in Seeda
items.prompt: AI video generation gets much easier when you stop treating audio as an afterthought. A workflow I’ve been exploring: 1. Create the complete soundtrack with Seed-Audio 1.0. 2. Use that audio to drive the visuals in Seedance. Instead of one giant prompt describing dialogue, music, sound effects, emotions, and camera movement, each model focuses on what it does best. The result is a more natural production process: • Dialogue defines the rhythm. • Music shapes the emotional arc. • Sound effects reinforce every action. • Ambient audio gives the scene depth. Once that’s locked in, Seedance can concentrate on cinematic visuals and camera motion. It’s a simple shift in workflow, but for AI films, story-driven content, and game cinematics, it can make the entire generation process feel far more intentional. Think audio first. Visuals second. Enterprises and Developers can access the official API via BytePlus, and you can also use it directly on @byteplus and @lumina Experience link with Lumina:  @BytePlusGlobal @lumina_ai_aiart

items.prompt: THIS GUY USED ONLY TWO PROMPTS. ONE FAKE DISH. 2.8 MILLION VIEWS No stove. No camera. No real food One AI-generated photo becomes ten scene images ➜ Each image animates into a clip ➜ CapCut stitches them ➜ Subtitles sell the motion ➜ Upload ➜ Get paid The pipeline: > Generate one reference photo of a plated dish. > Prompt ten numbered cooking scenes from that photo. > Animate each scene into a 2-second clip. > Stitch in CapCut with trending audio and word-by-word subtitles. > Upload to TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook, X The numbers: 2.8 million views. $2,500 at TikTok's rate. The entire video is 20 seconds of AI motion. No filming ever happened The real skill is building the prompt chain that generates the illusion of cooking. The hook is the finished dish. The retention is the motion blur and steam. The monetization is the platform algorithm treating it as real content People still think AI video means filming something and editing it faster. This is the opposite. Nothing was filmed. Nothing was cooked. The product is the pipeline itself That is the shift. The workflow is the product. The content is just Bookmark this so you don’t lose it

items.title: Seedance 2.0 on @higgsfield PROMPT ⬇ Use my uploaded character sheet as the ONLY reference for t
items.description: Seedance 2.0 on @higgsfield PROMPT ⬇ Use my uploaded character sheet as the ONLY reference for the character. Preserve the exact facial features, hairstyle, body proportions, skin tone, and identity throughout the entire
items.prompt: Seedance 2.0 on @higgsfield PROMPT ⬇ Use my uploaded character sheet as the ONLY reference for the character. Preserve the exact facial features, hairstyle, body proportions, skin tone, and identity throughout the entire video. The character must remain perfectly consistent. Do NOT change the face, body, or hairstyle. Only the outfit and environment change. Create a premium 15-second cinematic travel-fashion commercial where the character journeys through seven iconic countries. Every transition is triggered by the character touching or adjusting her outfit. As the outfit transforms, the entire environment seamlessly changes into the next country. The camera follows the character in one continuous cinematic shot with smooth movement and no cuts. Sequence: ① France 🇫🇷 The character wears an elegant Parisian luxury outfit. She gently adjusts her blazer collar. As she pulls the collar into place, her outfit transforms into the next country's traditional fashion while the Eiffel Tower and the streets of Paris seamlessly become the next location. ② Japan 🇯🇵 She now wears a modern luxury kimono-inspired outfit. She gently holds one sleeve and spins gracefully. During the spin, both her outfit and the scenery transform into South Korea. Background: Gyeongbokgung Palace with Seoul skyline. ③ South Korea 🇰🇷 She wears a modern designer hanbok-inspired outfit. She lightly smooths the front of her jacket. As her hand moves downward, the outfit transforms while the palace becomes the streets of Italy. Background: Colosseum and Rome cityscape. ④ Italy 🇮🇹 She wears elegant Italian luxury fashion. She adjusts her sunglasses and smiles confidently. As she lowers her hand, both the outfit and scenery transform. Background: Colosseum and classic Roman architecture. ⑤ United Arab Emirates 🇦🇪 She now wears a luxurious modern abaya-inspired couture outfit. She gently lifts the flowing fabric. As it falls, the environment transforms. Background: Burj Khalifa and Downtown Dubai at sunset. ⑥ India 🇮🇳 She wears an elegant contemporary designer saree. She gracefully adjusts the pallu over her shoulder. During the motion, the outfit transforms once more. Background: Taj Mahal during golden hour. ⑦ United States 🇺🇸 (Final Hero Scene) She now wears premium New York luxury street fashion. She confidently walks toward the camera as Times Square and the New York skyline surround her. The camera slowly pushes in while she gives a confident smile, ending with a premium fashion-commercial hero shot. Every transition is physically motivated by touching, adjusting, pulling, or spinning the clothing. The outfit and environment transform simultaneously with seamless cinematic match cuts, realistic fabric simulation, and premium architectural morphing. Camera: One continuous tracking shot, smooth dolly movement, occasional orbit, 50mm and 85mm cinematic lenses, shallow depth of field. Lighting: Natural golden-hour lighting adapted to each country with realistic reflections, soft rim lighting, and cinematic atmosphere. Style: Luxury Louis Vuitton, Dior, Gucci, Chanel global fashion campaign mixed with National Geographic travel cinematography. Ultra-realistic, premium editorial quality, flawless fabric physics, authentic architecture, 8K HDR, award-winning commercial cinematography, smooth transitions, no glitches, no text, no watermark.

items.title: This is probably the easiest way to make AI videos. AZ8 lets you try the same shot across Kling,
items.description: This is probably the easiest way to make AI videos. AZ8 lets you try the same shot across Kling, Seedance, Wan, and Vidu without starting over each time. Every asset you generate or upload saves to one shared library, so
items.prompt: This is probably the easiest way to make AI videos. AZ8 lets you try the same shot across Kling, Seedance, Wan, and Vidu without starting over each time. Every asset you generate or upload saves to one shared library, so you reuse the same reference across models instead of re-uploading it from scratch. Zumi, the agent inside the workspace, tracks your prompts, scenes, and decisions across the whole project, and flags what's missing or suggests the next step instead of leaving you to piece it together yourself. The real difference isn't which model renders best. It's that you stop rebuilding your project every time you try a different one

Every asset you generate or upload saves to one shared library, so you reuse the same reference across models instead of re-uploading it from scratch. Zumi, the agent inside the workspace, tracks your prompts, scenes, and decisions across the whole project, and flags what's missing or suggests the next step instead of leaving you to piece it together yourself. The real difference isn't which model renders best. It's that you stop rebuilding your project every time you try a different one

items.title: Lets start the day with light workout Seedance 2.0 on @SocialSight Prompt : Create a realistic .
items.description: Lets start the day with light workout Seedance 2.0 on @SocialSight Prompt : Create a realistic fitness GRWM (Get Ready With Me) lifestyle video featuring a stylish young woman wearing a matching red athletic sports set c
items.prompt: Lets start the day with light workout Seedance 2.0 on @SocialSight Prompt : Create a realistic fitness GRWM (Get Ready With Me) lifestyle video featuring a stylish young woman wearing a matching red athletic sports set consisting of a fitted sports bra and high-waisted leggings. Bright modern home with floor-to-ceiling windows, warm morning sunlight, cozy contemporary décor, cinematic handheld camera, ultra-realistic lifestyle photography. The video opens with her waking up naturally in bed as soft golden sunlight fills the bedroom. She stretches with a smile, walks into the bathroom, splashes water on her face, and begins a refreshing skincare routine using cleanser, toner, serum, moisturizer, and lip balm. Cinematic beauty close-ups highlight naturally glowing skin. She blow-dries her hair, ties it into a sleek high ponytail, and applies light natural makeup including concealer, blush, mascara, and a glossy lip tint. She smiles confidently while checking the final look in the mirror. She changes into a vibrant red matching workout set, adjusts the fit, slips on white sneakers, wears wireless earbuds, and prepares a protein shake with fresh fruit in the kitchen. She fills her water bottle and walks through sliding glass doors into her lush backyard garden. The workout begins with a yoga mat laid across the green lawn surrounded by flowers and trees. She performs dynamic stretches, bodyweight squats, lunges, jumping jacks, planks, mountain climbers, glute bridges, and resistance band exercises. Cinematic slow-motion shots capture hair movement, natural smiles, and energetic motion while sunlight filters through the trees. Between exercises, she drinks water, wipes her face with a towel, and enjoys a few moments relaxing in the peaceful garden before finishing with gentle stretching and deep breathing. The video ends with her sitting comfortably on the yoga mat, holding her protein shake toward the camera with a bright smile. The camera slowly pulls back to reveal the beautiful garden, warm morning sunshine, and calm outdoor atmosphere. Style: premium fitness creator content, realistic lifestyle vlog, luxury home workout aesthetic, cinematic handheld and gimbal camera movement, elegant transitions, warm natural lighting, lush garden scenery, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, commercial-quality visuals, 4K HDR, 16:9 widescreen. Negative Prompt: No text, no captions, no subtitles, no logos, no watermarks, no UI elements, no duplicate people, no cartoon style, no distorted anatomy.

items.title: Kling AI 3.0 Turbo on Kling App Prompt : Main Subject: Young Korean woman, early 20s, rolled-up
items.description: Kling AI 3.0 Turbo on Kling App Prompt : Main Subject: Young Korean woman, early 20s, rolled-up work pants, mud-splattered oversized shirt, hair tied back messily, wild joyful laughter, fearless muddy energy. Location: F
items.prompt: Kling AI 3.0 Turbo on Kling App Prompt : Main Subject: Young Korean woman, early 20s, rolled-up work pants, mud-splattered oversized shirt, hair tied back messily, wild joyful laughter, fearless muddy energy. Location: Flooded rice paddy field during a village harvest festival, midday. Muddy water reflecting sky, scattered rice stalks, wooden field markers, distant mountains, other muddy footprints crisscrossing the field. No modern equipment. Visual Style: Vivid realistic documentary tone, chaotic festive energy, bright natural midday light. Camera Style: Early 2000s camcorder, operator also in the mud struggling to keep steady, heavy splashing on lens, exposure blown out from wet reflections, thick handheld shake. No stabilization. Timeline (15 sec, each slot = 2 compressed beats): 00:00–00:03 → She sprints through the muddy paddy, then deliberately belly-flops into the mud with a huge splash. 00:03–00:06 → She surfaces laughing hysterically, then flings a handful of mud toward the camera. 00:06–00:09 → She struggles to stand, slipping twice, then finally gets up covered head to toe. 00:09–00:12 → She points at another muddy figure off-camera, shouting "저기 봐, 완전 진흙탕이야!" ("Look there, it's a total mud pit!"). 00:12–00:15 → She raises both arms triumphantly, mud dripping, yelling "내가 이겼다!" ("I won!"), as the scene fades. Audio: Splashing mud, distant festival drums, laughter, squelching footsteps. Her dialogue as noted above. No music. Goal: A chaotic, joyful mud festival moment wild, hilarious, deeply alive.

items.prompt: AI filmmaking is getting wild. Stop writing giant video prompts to control dialogue, timing, and emotion. Generate the audio first with Seed Audio 1.0. Then Seedance 2.0 follows its timing. Workflow: 1. Write the scene as a sound timeline 2. Generate audio with Seed Audio 1.0 3. Feed it into Seedance 2.0 as reference 4. Keep the video prompt purely visual @BytePlusGlobal @lumina_ai_aiart Try it at:

items.title: ONE SPIN AND SHE'S A DIFFERENT PERSON. Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Scene & Mood: Sharp studio editorial
items.description: ONE SPIN AND SHE'S A DIFFERENT PERSON. Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Scene & Mood: Sharp studio editorial built around a single continuous spin transformation. A woman in a fitted matte-black slip dress stands center frame under
items.prompt: ONE SPIN AND SHE'S A DIFFERENT PERSON. Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Scene & Mood: Sharp studio editorial built around a single continuous spin transformation. A woman in a fitted matte-black slip dress stands center frame under moody spotlighting, still and composed, then spins once and completes the rotation in a completely different look: a structured chrome art-deco gown with metallic panel detailing. The mood is theatrical, high-impact, confident, with the spin treated as one unbroken magic trick rather than a cut. Frame Map: Begin in a medium-full frontal composition, subject centered, arms relaxed at her sides, dark studio backdrop with a single hard key light from camera-left casting a long diagonal shadow. Maintain headroom above and enough negative space on both sides to track the dress silhouette expanding mid-spin. The floor is glossy black, reflecting a faint silhouette. Subject Lock: Keep the same face, hair part, height, and body proportions throughout both looks. Look A: sleek middle-parted dark hair, matte-black slip dress, bare shoulders, minimal silver jewelry, neutral confident expression. Look B (post-spin): same hair now swept into a sharp low chignon, structured chrome-panel gown with a stiff architectural collar, metallic cuff on one wrist, same facial features and expression carried through. Do not change her height, face shape, or skin tone between looks. Cross-Frame Rules: She is the only person and subject in frame at all times. The transformation must occur entirely within the single continuous spin motion — no jump cuts, no freeze frames, no duplicated bodies mid-spin. Fabric physics must look weighty and real during the whirl, not liquid or melting. No on-screen text, no captions, no signage typography, no rendered text in the frame. Movement: 6 seconds total. She begins still for 1 second, then initiates a fast single clockwise spin over 2 seconds, dress and hair flaring outward with real centrifugal motion, arms lifting slightly for balance. As she completes the rotation and faces camera again, the new gown settles into place with a final fabric snap and hair falls into its chignon shape naturally. She holds the new pose, still and composed, for the final 3 seconds, chin lifted, eyes locked on camera. Last Frame: She stands still in the chrome art-deco gown, facing camera directly, chin slightly lifted, one hand resting at her hip, expression calm and powerful. Studio light holds steady on her face. No on-screen text, no captions, no signage typography, no rendered text in the frame. World Plate: Minimal black-box studio, single hard key light, glossy reflective floor, deep shadow falloff into the background with no visible walls or props. Clean, high-contrast, editorial darkness. Sound Bed: Diegetic audio only: fabric whoosh during the spin, a soft heel pivot on the glossy floor, faint jewelry chime, quiet room tone. No music, no soundtrack, no score, no lyrics. Capture Realism: Natural skin texture, real fabric weight and flare physics, believable hair movement settling into the chignon, grounded contact shadows, soft highlight rolloff, fine 35mm grain. Avoid AI gloss, warped limbs, melted fabric, duplicated body parts, or hair clipping through the gown collar. Camera Capture: 6 seconds, 24fps, locked-off static camera, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field isolating subject from the dark backdrop, punchy contrast grade, fine grain, crisp studio realism.

Avoid AI gloss, warped limbs, melted fabric, duplicated body parts, or hair clipping through the gown collar. Camera Capture: 6 seconds, 24fps, locked-off static camera, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field isolating subject from the dark backdrop, punchy contrast grade, fine grain, crisp studio realism.

items.title: THIS GUY CONNECTED FABLE 5 + HIGGSFIELD SO ONE CLAUDE PROMPT CAN BECOME 5 DIFFERENT CREATIVE ASS
items.description: THIS GUY CONNECTED FABLE 5 + HIGGSFIELD SO ONE CLAUDE PROMPT CAN BECOME 5 DIFFERENT CREATIVE ASSETS The interesting part is not “Claude can make a video.” It is the stack shape. Claude becomes the front door. Fable 5 han
items.prompt: THIS GUY CONNECTED FABLE 5 + HIGGSFIELD SO ONE CLAUDE PROMPT CAN BECOME 5 DIFFERENT CREATIVE ASSETS The interesting part is not “Claude can make a video.” It is the stack shape. Claude becomes the front door. Fable 5 handles the creative brief/control layer. Higgsfield gives the workflow access to image and video generation. Then one prompt can branch into different outputs instead of dying as one static answer. The video shows the simple version: Open Claude. Add a custom connector. Paste the Higgsfield MCP connector back in. Use Claude to drive the creative stack. The demos are the scroll-stopper: realistic UGC-style ad creatives animated websites 3D models turned into cinematic scenes years of research turned into an interactive game world scripts turned into explainer videos with generated visuals That is the specific payoff. A solo marketer can test 5 ad directions before hiring a production team. A founder can turn a landing page idea into motion assets in the same session. A creator can move from script to visual treatment without manually opening 6 different tools. The reusable mechanism is simple: the brief, the routing, and the asset generation start happening inside one conversation. That changes who can prototype. Not because every output is production-ready. Because the first version gets cheaper, faster, and more visual. Caveat is obvious: this is still a connector workflow, not magic production quality. You still need taste, prompting, iteration, rights checks, and a human deciding what is usable. But Fable 5 + Higgsfield is one of the clearest examples of where Claude is going: less chatbot, more creative software control room.

items.title: STOP MAKING AI VIDEOS THAT LOOK FAKE Realism in AI requires acting like a director rather than j
items.description: STOP MAKING AI VIDEOS THAT LOOK FAKE Realism in AI requires acting like a director rather than just a user. Most creators fail to achieve authentic results because they overlook the emotional foundation of the scene. The
items.prompt: STOP MAKING AI VIDEOS THAT LOOK FAKE Realism in AI requires acting like a director rather than just a user. Most creators fail to achieve authentic results because they overlook the emotional foundation of the scene. The 3-Step Realism Framework 1. Define the Emotion Realism begins with a specific feeling. Before generating a single frame, you must decide what emotion you are delivering-whether it is happiness, heartbreak, or frustration. 2. Director-Level Prompting Use Kling 3.0, which is uniquely capable of capturing nuances like accents, pronunciations, and facial feelings. To make the character come to life, you must prompt for the exact expression required for the scene. 3. Use the Official Setup Access the Kling Omni model through the official website. This provides a high level of creative control and functions as a cockpit for creators, allowing you to lock characters for consistency throughout your project. Why this works By following this framework, you move beyond random generations and start building a consistent digital cast with professional-grade realism. Want the prompts? I am sharing the exact expressions and the system link used in this video. Comment the word FEEL below, and I will send them directly to your DMs.

items.title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 👇 Scene & Mood: Cinematic luxury portrait in a warm amber Arabian lounge. C
items.description: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 👇 Scene & Mood: Cinematic luxury portrait in a warm amber Arabian lounge. Calm, powerful, mysterious mood. Rich red textiles, brass lanterns, patterned cushions, soft haze, and practical firelight. F
items.prompt: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 👇 Scene & Mood: Cinematic luxury portrait in a warm amber Arabian lounge. Calm, powerful, mysterious mood. Rich red textiles, brass lanterns, patterned cushions, soft haze, and practical firelight. Frame Map: Start from image1composition. Subject stays center right in a medium wide seated portrait, facing camera. Knees and hands remain visible. Ornate tea table and brass objects stay softly blurred in the lower foreground. Lanterns, cushions, and carved wall decor remain behind him. Keep warm negative space on the left. Slow push in ends as a closer medium portrait. Subject Lock: Image1 Preserve the same seated male subject: same face, skin tone, trimmed facial hair, dark sunglasses, red and white keffiyeh, black agal, white thobe, leopard pattern cloak, watch, rings, body shape, seated posture, relaxed hand placement, and composed expression. Image 1 the same face, hair, wardrobe, body shape, and silhouette throughout. Cloak stays naturally draped over both shoulders. Thobe stays matte white with soft real fabric folds. Cross Frame Rules: No identity drift, no face change, no wardrobe change, no altered sunglasses, no extra jewelry, no headwear change. Subject remains center right at the same depth and eyeline. Do not add people or modern objects. Keep the same lounge layout, lantern positions, patterned textiles, brass objects, amber palette, and shallow depth. Movement: 15s continuous shot. Subject remains seated and still with slow breathing. His right fingers relax slightly on his knee, left hand barely shifts against the fabric, and his head tilts a few degrees toward camera. Keffiyeh edge, cloak fibers, thobe folds, watch, and rings catch tiny natural movements. Lantern flames flicker gently, brass highlights shimmer softly, haze drifts in the background. Camera makes a slow, smooth push in with subtle handheld breath, never shaky. Last Frame: End on a closer medium portrait. Subject remains center-right, sunglasses facing camera, shoulders and upper torso dominant, right hand relaxed on knee, leopard cloak framing the white thobe. Lantern glow and patterned textiles stay softly visible behind him. Camera settles nearly locked. No on screen text, no captions, no signage typography, no rendered text in the frame. World Plate: Ornate lounge with burgundy, red, black, gold, and amber tones. Layered rugs, cushions, wall hangings, carved circular wall decor, brass lanterns, and polished metal objects create depth. Lighting comes from practical lanterns with soft falloff and lifted shadows. Mild incense haze adds air depth. Textures feel tactile: woven fabric, matte cotton, aged brass, carved metal, natural looking fur. Sound Bed: Diegetic audio only: quiet lantern flame flicker, faint room tone, soft fabric rustle from breathing, subtle jewelry movement, distant air movement. No music, no score, no vocals, no lyrics. Capture Realism: Natural skin texture, matte skin, realistic facial hair, believable fabric weight, soft highlight rolloff, lifted shadows, mild grain, restrained contrast, no plastic AI gloss, no doll skin, no over sharpening, no crushed blacks, no clipped whites. Brass glows softly, not mirror shiny. Fur texture stays natural. Camera Capture: 50mm cinema lens, slow push in portrait shot, 24fps, 180 degree shutter, wide latitude cinema capture, subtle handheld breath, shallow depth of field, fine 35mm film grain, warm amber burgundy grade, realistic practical lantern light, 15s runtime.

items.prompt: The world sees beauty first. She makes you remember the strength behind it. GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2.0 on @thankyouai_hq prompt A cinematic, high-intensity fight sequence in a dark, gritty industrial warehouse at night with dim overhead lights, green peeling walls, chain-link fences, metal scaffolding, and scattered debris. A beautiful East Asian woman with long flowing black hair, visible facial scratches and intense determined expressions, is engaged in a raw, dynamic hand-to-hand combat against a male attacker in dark clothing. She wears a delicate, flowing baby pink dress (instead of her original jacket) that contrasts dramatically with the violent action — the soft pink fabric billows, swirls, and tears slightly during the fierce movements, hair whipping wildly. The sequence includes: close-ups of her fierce face and flowing hair, powerful punches and kicks with motion blur, grappling, throwing the man down, dramatic spins, hair flips, kneeling over the defeated attacker, then rising victoriously while breathing heavily. Moody teal-green color grading, realistic particle effects like dust and fabric motion, intense choreography, dramatic camera angles (handheld, tracking shots, low angles), high detail, filmic lighting, 4K cinematic quality, emotional and empowering tone. write hook captions for this

The sequence includes: close-ups of her fierce face and flowing hair, powerful punches and kicks with motion blur, grappling, throwing the man down, dramatic spins, hair flips, kneeling over the defeated attacker, then rising victoriously while breathing heavily. Moody teal-green color grading, realistic particle effects like dust and fabric motion, intense choreography, dramatic camera angles (handheld, tracking shots, low angles), high detail, filmic lighting, 4K cinematic quality, emotional and empowering tone. write hook captions for this

items.title: 2.8 million views. Without a single real ingredient. No stove. No camera. No chef. While most pe
items.description: 2.8 million views. Without a single real ingredient. No stove. No camera. No chef. While most people spend hours filming, buying ingredients, and chasing perfect lighting, someone else is already getting millions of view
items.prompt: 2.8 million views. Without a single real ingredient. No stove. No camera. No chef. While most people spend hours filming, buying ingredients, and chasing perfect lighting, someone else is already getting millions of views from content that never existed in the real world. And if you ignore this trend today, in just a few years you may find yourself watching others profit from the new attention economy while you’re trying to catch up. The secret lies in disciplined prompt engineering. You don’t ask AI to simply “make a video.” You first generate a photorealistic reference image of the dish, then break it into 10 separate scenes with precisely defined camera angles, motion blur, depth of field, rising steam, and the tiny visual details that convince viewers they’re watching a real kitchen. Each scene is turned into a two-second clip using Image-to-Video generators, then everything is assembled in CapCut with trending music and automatic captions. Those captions - combined with the right editing pace - are crucial for audience retention because today’s viewers want to watch food that looks irresistible, whether it exists in the real world or not. Instead of being limited by filming, expensive equipment, or lighting, you become the architect of a content factory that can scale almost infinitely - from earning through Creator Rewards to selling AI-generated food content to restaurants that want flawless videos without renting a studio or hiring professional chefs. This isn’t the future anymore - it’s the new attention economy. And in this economy, your greatest asset isn’t culinary talent. It’s your ability to write prompts that make the TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube algorithms work for you. While others are cooking meals, you can build a scalable system, hit “Export,” and collect views that turn into real income.

items.title: 🚨GUESS WHICH VIDEO WAS SHOT ON A REAL CAMERA AND WHICH ONE WAS MADE IN SEEDANCE To make AI vide
items.description: 🚨GUESS WHICH VIDEO WAS SHOT ON A REAL CAMERA AND WHICH ONE WAS MADE IN SEEDANCE To make AI video look real, it’s not enough to just write “realistic”. You have to deliberately add the things that usually ruin a shot: >
items.prompt: 🚨GUESS WHICH VIDEO WAS SHOT ON A REAL CAMERA AND WHICH ONE WAS MADE IN SEEDANCE To make AI video look real, it’s not enough to just write “realistic”. You have to deliberately add the things that usually ruin a shot: > Shaky handheld camera > Slight digital artifacts > Small focus misses These “imperfections” are exactly what makes it feel alive. Most people are still trying to make the image look perfectly clean. But the ones who actually understand how realism works are doing the opposite — they’re adding controlled flaws on purpose. That’s the current meta. Well, both videos were made in Seedance, just so you know. Full prompt in the comments.

items.title: One swipe. One match. A whole dream world unlocked. A collectible toy romance brought to life, f
items.description: One swipe. One match. A whole dream world unlocked. A collectible toy romance brought to life, from the first spark to a magical carnival moment. Made with Seedream 5.0 + Seedance on @budgetpixel Prompt: PART 1 + PART 2
items.prompt: One swipe. One match. A whole dream world unlocked. A collectible toy romance brought to life, from the first spark to a magical carnival moment. Made with Seedream 5.0 + Seedance on @budgetpixel Prompt: PART 1 + PART 2 — "THE SWIPE TO THE CARNIVAL" (0:00–0:30) GLOBAL STYLE: 3D Vinyl Toy Aesthetic, STYLE ID: vinyl-toy-3d-01, Pixar/DreamWorks-adjacent CGI, premium collectible designer toy style, oversized heads, rounded toy limbs, matte vinyl skin, sculpted molded hair chunks, simplified toy clothing, expressive character faces, soft shadowless studio lighting, seamless mauve-grey and warm terracotta-pink environments, polished animated short-film quality, 16:9, --profile naoi4dm. CHARACTER CONTINUITY: Girl-toy: oversized head, large expressive eyes, teal-streaked molded hair, matte vinyl skin, cute pastel outfit, rounded toy proportions. Guy-toy: oversized head, glossy sculpted hair, chiseled vinyl jaw, polished collectible figure appearance. Maintain identical characters, materials, proportions, and style throughout. --- PART 1 — "THE SWIPE" (0:00–0:15) SHOT 1 (0–4s) — ENDLESS SWIPE Girl-toy lies on a toy bed in a cool grey studio bedroom. An oversized phone glows on her face as she repeatedly swipes left with stiff toy-joint motion. Teal molded hair catches soft rim lighting. Expression shows boredom and curiosity. SHOT 2 (4–7s) — THE MATCH She suddenly stops. Phone reveals a flawless guy-toy with glossy molded hair, exaggerated vinyl jaw, perfect toy smile. Her oversized eyes widen dramatically. Phone notification: "IT'S A MATCH." SHOT 3 (7–10s) — THE INVITATION Phone buzzes. A floating toy-style message appears: "Carnival tonight? I'll be the one by the Ferris wheel. Impossible to miss." She hugs the phone, legs kicking with exaggerated vinyl excitement. Tiny hearts and sparkles appear. SHOT 4 (10–15s) — PERFECT DREAM A glowing thought bubble surrounds her. Reality shifts into warm terracotta-pink fantasy tones. Inside the dream: • Mini toy wedding diorama • Guy-toy lifting her romantically • Tiny sculpted ring box • Carnival fantasy elements End with girl-toy hugging a heart-shaped pillow, dreamy smile: "Finally. My perfect match." --- PART 2 — "THE CARNIVAL MEET" (0:15–0:30) SHOT 5 (15–18s) — GETTING READY Continue from the final dream frame. Girl-toy wakes in her toy bedroom, checks the carnival reminder, and transforms into a cute carnival outfit. She practices a confident pose in a toy mirror. SHOT 6 (18–21s) — ARRIVING AT THE CARNIVAL Wide shot of a handcrafted toy carnival with glowing Ferris wheel, colorful booths, and warm terracotta lighting. Girl-toy enters, amazed by the magical environment. SHOT 7 (21–24s) — THE FERRIS WHEEL MEETING She waits near the Ferris wheel and checks the message again. Guy-toy appears in a premium hero pose with glossy hair and polished vinyl details. She reacts with huge excited eyes. SHOT 8 (24–27s) — FIRST HELLO Both toys meet under glowing carnival lights. He waves, she smiles shyly. Their exaggerated toy expressions create a charming animated moment. SHOT 9 (27–30s) — THE PERFECT MOMENT Romantic montage: • Riding the toy Ferris wheel • Sharing oversized cotton candy • Playing carnival games • Taking a selfie under glowing lights Final hero frame: Both toys hold hands beneath the Ferris wheel. Camera pushes toward the girl-toy's dreamy expression as she believes she found her perfect match. QUALITY: Premium collectible toy animation, exact character consistency, cinematic storytelling, clean CGI render, no realistic humans, no photorealism, no style change.

items.title: I remember having a very similar style on Midjourney back in the day. A long time ago actually.
items.description: I remember having a very similar style on Midjourney back in the day. A long time ago actually. Now you can do it with GPT Prompt: 2x2 grid, 16:9, do this for 4 days that made humans hope: input = $ subject # 1. analyze
items.prompt: I remember having a very similar style on Midjourney back in the day. A long time ago actually. Now you can do it with GPT Prompt: 2x2 grid, 16:9, do this for 4 days that made humans hope: input = $ subject # 1. analyze the subject. silhouette = extract_silhouette(input) internal_rhythm = detect_repeated_details(input) gesture_flow = infer_motion_paths(input) focal_zones = detect_focal_regions(input) # 2. convert the subject into an optical terrain. subject_field = morph_into_op_art( silhouette, surface_logic=[ 'wavy contour bands', 'parallel black-white ribbons', 'nested curves', 'glowing grayscale gradients', 'liquid negative space' ], preserve_identity=true ) # 3. replace texture with hypnotic pattern behavior. pattern_layer = generate_patterns( source=internal_rhythm, pattern_types=[ 'concentric rings', 'spiral curls', 'bubble chains', 'dot constellations', 'striped topographic lines', 'ornamental lace paths' ], contrast='pure black to bright white', density='medium-high' ) # 4. turn the environment into a dream metropolis / symbolic field. background = construct_surreal_stage( based_on=input, elements=[ 'impossible towers', 'floating moons', 'arched city silhouettes', 'long luminous roadways', 'wave-like ground planes', 'star-speckled black sky' ], style='monochrome dream architecture' ) # 5. add grayscale glow, not color. lighting = apply_luminous_monochrome( highlights='soft white glow along edges', shadows='deep velvet black', midtones='smooth metallic gray gradients' ) output: a black-and-white surreal op-art transformation of $ subject, where form, ground, and background become flowing optical waves, glowing city geometry, ornamental pattern density, and hypnotic grayscale depth. avoid: - color - flat simple vector only - messy sketch lines - realistic material texture - cartoon cuteness - photographic depth of field

items.title: 📖SEEDANCE 2.5 VS 2.0: THE FIRST AI VIDEO MODEL THAT DOESN'T FORCE YOU TO STITCH CLIPS TOGETHER.
items.description: 📖SEEDANCE 2.5 VS 2.0: THE FIRST AI VIDEO MODEL THAT DOESN'T FORCE YOU TO STITCH CLIPS TOGETHER. ByteDance skipped straight from 2.0 to 2.5 — no small update, a generational jump. Seedance 2.0 caps out at 15 seconds per
items.prompt: 📖SEEDANCE 2.5 VS 2.0: THE FIRST AI VIDEO MODEL THAT DOESN'T FORCE YOU TO STITCH CLIPS TOGETHER. ByteDance skipped straight from 2.0 to 2.5 — no small update, a generational jump. Seedance 2.0 caps out at 15 seconds per clip. Anything longer means generating multiple pieces and stitching them on a timeline, hoping the face, lighting, and motion hold up across the cut. Seedance 2.5 generates 30 seconds in a single continuous pass. No stitching. No seams. One character tracked across an entire scene, start to finish. Here's what actually changed: • Native 30-second clips in one generation, up from 15 seconds • Up to 50 multimodal reference inputs (images, video, audio), up from just 12 • Localized editing — change one element (an outfit, a prop, a background) without regenerating the whole clip • 3D white-model previz — block out camera angles and composition before the final render • Native 4K with 10-bit color and synced audio in the same pass The catch: 2.5 is still rolling out in stages, with full public access expected in early July. Seedance 2.0 already renders native 4K today and remains the faster, cheaper option for short social clips. 📥Tomorrow I am covering a topic that most people skip and then regret skipping. 🔖Every step of this workflow is documented in the pinned article below. Which feature matters more for your workflow — the 30-second single take, or the 50 reference inputs?

items.description: 28-th Prompt for AI model Scene 1: Seedance 2.0 | 10 seconds | Ultra-realistic live-action cinematic | Single continuous take | Absolutely NO CUTS | TRUE IMAX cinematic presentation | 24fps | Wild organic handheld cinema
items.prompt: 28-th Prompt for AI model Scene 1: Seedance 2.0 | 10 seconds | Ultra-realistic live-action cinematic | Single continuous take | Absolutely NO CUTS | TRUE IMAX cinematic presentation | 24fps | Wild organic handheld cinematography | Raw documentary realism | Deliberately imperfect framing | Subject frequently off-center | Aggressive whip pans | Violent push-ins | Natural operator corrections | Fight choreography inspired by Atomic Blonde | Color grading inspired by Atomic Blonde with subtle Gothic noir: cold steel-blue shadows, warm golden chandelier highlights, rich burgundy tones, deep blacks, high contrast, subtle film grain. ABSOLUTELY NO MUSIC. Only realistic production audio: polished marble footsteps, breathing, cloth movement, leather coat movement, heavy body impacts, punches, elbows, knees, kicks, subtle bone impacts, marble echoes, broken crystal, drifting debris, natural ballroom ambience. MAIN SUBJECT Man identical to the uploaded reference image. Identical face, hairstyle, facial hair, skin tone, body proportions, tattoos, expression, and outfit. Wearing the identical luxurious white tailored suit with the jacket open, exposing the chest tattoos, white tailored trousers, black belt with a large gold “M” buckle, gold waist chain, white sneakers, dark sunglasses, wristwatch, and the identical dramatic long black feather coat draped over his shoulders. Hair tied into the identical man bun throughout the sequence. Calm, fearless, emotionless, highly trained elite assassin. LOCATION A breathtaking Gothic European grand ballroom inside an ancient luxury palace. Towering black marble columns. Massive crystal chandeliers. Gothic vaulted ceiling. Pointed arches. Black-and-gold baroque architecture. Tall stained-glass windows. Polished black-and-white marble floor reflecting warm chandelier light. Thin atmospheric haze. Completely empty. No furniture. No tables. No chairs. No guests. Only the man and three elite villains. VILLAINS Three elite professional fighters wearing impeccably tailored black Italian suits, crisp white dress shirts, black ties, and polished black leather shoes. Athletic, disciplined, intimidating, fighting with ruthless efficiency using realistic close-quarters combat. CAMERA LANGUAGE The camera behaves like a real combat cameraman trapped inside the fight. Wild handheld movement. Violent whip pans. Rapid push-ins. Micro-shakes. Sudden reframing. Realistic focus breathing. Natural rolling shutter. Bodies repeatedly block the lens. The operator almost loses the subject multiple times before instinctively recovering. The man is intentionally not centered for much of the sequence. TIMELINE 0.0–1.5s The handheld camera follows closely behind the man as he walks confidently along the second-floor balcony overlooking the vast Gothic ballroom. Without hesitation, he plants one foot onto the marble railing and launches himself into the enormous open atrium. His long black feather coat billows dramatically behind him. The camera instinctively dives after him, briefly losing the frame. 1.5–2.8s Falling beside him beneath the enormous crystal chandeliers, the camera struggles to keep pace. His feather coat and open white suit move naturally through the air before he rotates smoothly and lands in a powerful three-point landing. Marble dust and tiny crystal fragments burst across the polished floor. 2.8–3.8s Three elite villains slowly emerge from different directions, silently surrounding him in a loose triangle formation. They immediately rush forward together. 3.8–6.2s The fight erupts instantly. He slips between the first two attackers with explosive footwork, smashing a brutal elbow into the first villain’s jaw before driving a crushing knee into the second villain’s ribs. The handheld camera violently whip-pans between impacts, repeatedly blocked by moving bodies before recovering the action. Light blood sprays from a split lip. No gore. #actionmovie #fight

items.title: Seedance 2.0 on Imagineart Prompt: The shot opens tight on a beautiful woman face, wind tearing
items.description: Seedance 2.0 on Imagineart Prompt: The shot opens tight on a beautiful woman face, wind tearing at her coat as she stands on a jagged cliff. The camera eases over her shoulder and tilts down, following her line of sight.
items.prompt: Seedance 2.0 on Imagineart Prompt: The shot opens tight on a beautiful woman face, wind tearing at her coat as she stands on a jagged cliff. The camera eases over her shoulder and tilts down, following her line of sight. We descend past the crumbling lip into the void, the frame widening to reveal cliffs dropping away. The ocean roars into view, violent surf detonating against rock. The move continues into a high overhead, locking into an aerial top-down that frames the lone figure at the precipice as waves explode below.

items.title: If I want to make a video or image with AI for a tweet here is exactly how I do it right now inc
items.description: If I want to make a video or image with AI for a tweet here is exactly how I do it right now including for the image on this post 1. I go to my ai of choice and give it the tweet + style prompt. If I don’t like it I just
items.prompt: If I want to make a video or image with AI for a tweet here is exactly how I do it right now including for the image on this post 1. I go to my ai of choice and give it the tweet + style prompt. If I don’t like it I just go back and forth a bit but usually given a tweet and small direction you are good in 1-2 prompts 2. If I want to make a video take the image to grok imagine and tell it to turn it into a simple video Style prompt: Create a meme that communicates the idea in under one second. - Extremely simple composition. - One visual joke only. - No background clutter. - One or two characters maximum. - No text unless explicitly requested. - High-contrast silhouettes that are recognizable as a tiny thumbnail on X. - Exaggerated proportions and expressions. - Flat vector/cartoon style rather than realistic. - The image should be understandable without any explanation. - If there are multiple possible jokes, pick the single strongest one instead of combining ideas.

items.prompt: Making a cinematic and realistic video like this can now be achieved simply by typing a single prompt! CapCut just proved that the boundaries of our creativity are now right at our fingertips. With the CapCut AI Video Studio feature (Seedance 2.0 Model), you can get cinematic visuals, dynamic camera movements, and even super smooth explosion effects just like in this video. The steps are incredibly simple: 1️⃣ Open CapCut Web & go to Video Studio. 2️⃣ Select the Seedance 2.0 model, then set your resolution & duration. 3️⃣ Upload your reference photo + type in your imaginative prompt. 4️⃣ Hit 'Generate' and let the magic happen!

items.title: I used to do a lot of these mini city prompts. Here is a new structure I have been trying lately
items.description: I used to do a lot of these mini city prompts. Here is a new structure I have been trying lately. Animated with Kling. Prompt: I(0) = empty palm of hand, no sphere. I(1) = full detailed micro‑globe. ∂I/∂t = Δ(I, $ CITY)
items.prompt: I used to do a lot of these mini city prompts. Here is a new structure I have been trying lately. Animated with Kling. Prompt: I(0) = empty palm of hand, no sphere. I(1) = full detailed micro‑globe. ∂I/∂t = Δ(I, $ CITY) guided by: - Sphere appearing in palm. - Skyline crust growing radially as tiny plastic blocks. - Artery wrapping and curving. - Life details popping in. - Lighting evolving to daylight, DOF engaging. Integration: t=0.0–0.2: Hand appears, empty sphere materializes as a smooth grey ball. t=0.2–0.5: Building blocks erupt from surface, filling all space, height map guided by $ CITY. t=0.5–0.7: Artery curves around the front, dividing the dense crust. t=0.7–0.9: Tiny cars, boats, trees appear; material shifts to architectural model (plastic/wood). t=0.9–1.0: Daylight and DOF finalize, foreground hand sharp, background bokeh. Output I(1): photorealistic 1:1 macro image, ultra‑detailed, no empty space.

items.prompt: Sunday. Still some hours left for this Prompt Drop Weekend. Join the prompt drop party, share, try, create. ******* The Crane - Seedance 2.0 @Hailuo_AI Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9. Night. High above a neon city, one female agent escapes across the upper levels of an unfinished skyscraper during a storm. She runs across wet steel beams and exposed concrete toward the outer edge of the construction site while security chases behind her. A giant crane towers overhead, its heavy hook and cable swinging violently in the wind between this tower and a second unfinished skyscraper nearby. Rain lashes the structure, warning lights blink red, and the city glows far below through mist. Wide opening shot: the female agent sprints across the unfinished floor of the skyscraper while security appears behind her, closing in through the steel framework. The crane hook swings overhead in the storm. Tracking shot: she runs across a narrow beam and leaps onto a small platform near the edge of the building. Wind whips her hair and clothing. The crane cable swings closer, and she times her move while the storm grows more violent. Side shot: the agent grabs the swinging crane hook or cable and is pulled out into open air between the two skyscrapers. She swings across the gap high above the city while rain, wind, and flashing warning lights intensify the danger. Security reaches the edge behind her but cannot follow. Final 5 seconds: the action becomes more intense. The swing carries her toward the second unfinished tower. She crashes feet-first into the outer framework, struggles for a split second to hold on, then pulls herself onto a narrow beam or platform. The crane hook swings away behind her as she regains balance and keeps moving forward. Final moment: the female agent lands on the second skyscraper structure and turns briefly as the crane continues swinging behind her in the storm, with the neon skyline far below. Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic, fast-paced, intense, stressful, clear readable action, strong sense of height, storm, rain, steel beams, swinging crane hook, dynamic but readable camera movement, no text, no logos, no cartoon style, no famous celebrity faces, no recognizable actors, no movie-star resemblance, no public-figure likenesses, no clear facial close-ups. Keep proportions. Keep style and features. Aspect ratio 16:9.

items.description: Between Friday and Saturday, another prompt is dropped: Tha Dam - Seedance 2.0 on @Hailuo_AI Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9. Daytime during a violent storm. Two agents, one man a
items.prompt: Between Friday and Saturday, another prompt is dropped: Tha Dam - Seedance 2.0 on @Hailuo_AI Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9. Daytime during a violent storm. Two agents, one man and one woman, run along the top of a massive concrete dam while a security team chases behind them. The dam is huge and exposed, with narrow maintenance walkways, steel railings, warning lights, control boxes, heavy spray, and roaring water far below. Dark clouds gather overhead, wind drives rain across the structure, and the entire dam feels unstable under growing pressure. Wide opening shot: the two agents sprint along the top of the dam at full speed while security appears behind them, closing in. Water crashes below on one side, and storm wind pushes mist and spray across the walkway. Tracking shot: the agents keep running along the narrow concrete path as warning alarms flash. Ahead, massive spillway gates begin opening one by one. The structure shudders under the force, water erupts downward in huge torrents, and the agents struggle to keep balance on the slick surface. Side shot: the pressure increases. The dam shakes harder as more gates open. Spray blasts across the walkway, metal railings rattle, and one section of the path cracks near the edge. The agents keep moving, ducking around control structures and staying ahead of the security team. Final 5 seconds: the action becomes extreme. A maintenance section ahead partially breaks and drops, creating a gap in the walkway. The agents accelerate into a final desperate sprint, leap across the broken section, land hard, and keep moving while the spillway fully opens beside them. Water explodes downward with enormous force, the whole structure trembles, and the security team is slowed behind by spray and collapsing debris. Final moment: the two agents reach a safer platform near a control access door while the open spillway roars beside them, with storm, mist, and massive water pressure filling the frame. Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic, fast-paced, intense, stressful, clear readable action, strong sense of scale and danger, storm, rain, concrete dam, roaring water, heavy spray, shaking structure, dynamic but readable camera movement, no text, no logos, no cartoon style, no slow motion, no famous celebrity faces, no recognizable actors, no movie-star resemblance, no public-figure likenesses, no clear facial close-ups. Keep proportions. Keep style and features. Aspect ratio 16:9.

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 赛博朋克风格霓虹眼镜肖像
items.description: 一种风格化的赛博朋克提示词，在保持面部特征的同时，为参考肖像添加霓虹轮廓光和橙色反光眼镜。
items.prompt: 使用上传的图像作为参考，创作一张超写实电影级特写肖像。在不改变面部、表情、年龄、面部结构、发型、胡须形状、胡须密度、肤色、毛孔、皱纹、细小面部绒毛以及所有自然皮肤瑕疵的前提下，精准保留主体原有的面部特征。保持真实的面部比例和逼真的纹理。添加优雅、纤细的 {argument name="frame material" default="金色"} 边框眼镜，镜片为鲜艳的半透明 {argument name="lens color" default="橙色"} 反光镜片，确保双眼依然清晰可见且锐利。渲染物理上精确的镜片反射、微妙的折射、金属质感的金色高光以及逼真的玻璃透明度。为肖像添加戏剧性的霓虹灯光效果：左侧为 {argument name="left light" default="蓝色"} 轮廓光，右侧为炽热的红色轮廓光，在纯深黑色背景下营造出震撼的赛博朋克电影氛围。使用顶级电影级 HDR 灯光，实现平滑的色彩分离、逼真的光影衰减和高对比度。以非凡的细节捕捉每一个皮肤毛孔、皱纹、胡须、眉毛、睫毛和发丝。呈现逼真的皮肤微纹理、自然的次表面散射、光泽双唇、精致眼部和栩栩如生的面部轮廓。风格定位为奢华时尚摄影，采用极浅的景深，焦点锐利地聚焦于眼睛和眼镜，背景呈现奶油般的虚化效果，具备卓越的动态范围、清脆的金属高光和高级的调色。屡获殊荣的未来赛博朋克美学，不妥协的 8K 超写实画质，超逼真渲染，电影级构图，大师级品质，高度细节化，超写实，HDR，DSLR，中画幅相机品质，影棚灯光，逼真反射，高级修图，专业色彩科学。长宽比：3:4

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 忧郁单色另类肖像
items.description: 一个高对比度黑白影棚肖像提示词，用于创作一张忧郁风格的另类时尚半身照。
items.prompt: 创作一张正方形的黑白影棚肖像，主角是一位面部轮廓纤细、具有中性另类风格的年轻男性。他留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深色中长波浪卷发"}，头发向后梳并垂至肩部，呈现出自然的凌乱质感；佩戴大号圆形透明眼镜、扩耳饰以及一个小巧的鼻中隔环。他身穿一件超大号纯黑色圆领卫衣，几乎没有任何可见的品牌标志。构图为胸部以上，居中但位置略微偏下，头部向下倾斜并轻微侧向一边，双眼低垂，表情平静且内敛，嘴唇自然闭合。使用纯白色无缝背景，不含任何道具。灯光采用戏剧性的高对比度单色效果：从上方/左前方投射强而柔和的主光，在面部和卫衣上形成深邃的阴影，呈现出清晰的暗调、明显的颧骨和颈部线条，发丝处带有微妙的轮廓光，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感，营造出时尚杂志肖像的氛围。保持构图简约、写实、锐利且具有摄影感，景深适中，画面中不含任何文字或水印。

items.rawText: 创作一张正方形的黑白影棚肖像，主角是一位面部轮廓纤细、具有中性另类风格的年轻男性。他留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深色中长波浪卷发"}，头发向后梳并垂至肩部，呈现出自然的凌乱质感；佩戴大号圆形透明眼镜、扩耳饰以及一个小巧的鼻中隔环。他身穿一件超大号纯黑色圆领卫衣，几乎没有任何可见的品牌标志。构图为胸部以上，居中但位置略微偏下，头部向下倾斜并轻微侧向一边，双眼低垂，表情平静且内敛，嘴唇自然闭合。使用纯白色无缝背景，不含任何道具。灯光采用戏剧性的高对比度单色效果：从上方/左前方投射强而柔和的主光，在面部和卫衣上形成深邃的阴影，呈现出清晰的暗调、明显的颧骨和颈部线条，发丝处带有微妙的轮廓光，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感，营造出时尚杂志肖像的氛围。保持构图简约、写实、锐利且具有摄影感，景深适中，画面中不含任何文字或水印。

items.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 韩国夏日海滩救生员塔
items.description: 一个充满怀旧青春气息的提示词，画面描绘了一位坐在珊瑚粉色救生员塔上的女性，配有手绘涂鸦和夏日主题的日记文字。
items.prompt: 一张超写实电影感梦幻生活方式照片，旨在庆祝 {argument name="year text" default="SUMMER ’26"}，画面中一位年轻的 {argument name="ethnicity" default="Korean"} 女性独自坐在宁静海滩上一座褪色的 {argument name="tower color" default="coral-pink"} 复古救生员塔的上层平台上，采用近距离低角度拍摄。使用更紧凑的构图，聚焦于她的上半身、悬垂的双腿以及风化的木质平台，营造出亲密、宁静且充满青春气息的氛围。救生员塔应呈现出自然的陈旧感和日晒褪色效果，而非崭新或人工感。她随意地坐在平台边缘，身穿浅蓝白条纹无袖连体裤，脚蹬轻便的白色帆布鞋，一顶柔软的米色渔夫帽松散地挂在脑后。手腕上挂着一台小型复古胶片相机，另一只手拿着一支半融化的马卡龙色冰棒。她望向远方的大海，带着温柔且不经意的微笑，流露出宁静的自由感、对夏日的期待以及无尽暑假的感觉。她的深色长发扎成松散的低马尾，几缕发丝在温暖的海风中自然飘动。条纹布料和帽子丝带向同一方向轻轻飘扬。侧栏杆上系着一只半透明的黄色风筝，高高飘浮在上方，增添了灵动的趣味。她身旁放着一条折叠的条纹沙滩巾、一个小贝壳袋和一副复古太阳镜。可爱的彩色手绘涂鸦自然地融入场景中：小贝壳、微笑的太阳、波浪、星星、爱心、闪光、海鸥和迷你小鱼。在开阔的天空中添加手写风格的白色草图文字，如同夏日日记的笔记：“SUMMER ’26”、“sea you soon”、“salt in the air”、“stay golden”。背景是大面积的淡蓝色夏日天空，留白充裕。仅在底部边缘隐约呈现波光粼粼的海平线，保持构图的通透、简洁和情感空间感。明亮的海岸日光，柔和的过曝高光，朦胧的梦幻光晕，微妙的镜头光斑，马卡龙色胶片色调，低对比度，平滑的高光过渡，自然通透的皮肤质感。配色方案：褪色的珊瑚粉、粉蓝色、海沫绿、半透明黄、暖白色、沙米色。风格：电影感编辑生活方式摄影，韩国独立夏日美学，怀旧青春日记氛围，Kodak Portra 160 胶片质感，细腻的胶片颗粒，超细节梦幻写实，自然皮肤纹理，8K，竖构图比例 3:4。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 电影感城市街头倒影人像
items.description: 一个高级时尚人像提示词，利用蓝色时刻透过玻璃店面拍摄的城市倒影和交通灯光轨迹。
items.prompt: 超写实电影感街头时尚人像，一位时髦的年轻女性站在蓝色时刻繁华街道的落地玻璃店面旁。她身穿一件超大款 {argument name="blazer color" default="炭黑色"} 羊毛西装外套，内搭修身黑色背心，下着浅色高腰牛仔裤，佩戴极简银色圆环耳环，妆容自然随性。头发松散地扎在脑后，几缕发丝修饰脸庞。她神情自信，带着冷静的杂志大片感凝视镜头。场景透过玻璃拍摄，营造出层叠的倒影、微妙的重影以及城市景观的透明叠加效果。长曝光捕捉到的交通灯光在画面中划出鲜艳的红、橙、白、青色光轨，柔和的霓虹灯和模糊的车灯营造出电影般的焦外成像效果。混合了 {argument name="lighting" default="环境暮光"} 与店面灯光，为面部带来柔和的光泽，平衡了冷暖色调。高端奢侈时尚广告审美，Vogue 杂志摄影风格，构图自然且精致，浅景深，柔和的胶片颗粒感，真实的皮肤质感，光学镜头反光，自然色彩分级，{argument name="camera model" default="Leica SL2-S"}，Summilux 50mm f/1.4 镜头，Kodak Portra 400 色调，超写实，HDR，8K，杰作。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 地中海奢华时尚广告大片
items.description: 一份用于生成地中海背景下高质量奢华时尚摄影的详细提示词，侧重于展现真实的质感与精致的造型。
items.prompt: 超写实奢华时尚大片，9:16。全身人像，模特为 {argument name="person" default="30 岁出头女性，身高 165–168 厘米，苗条女性身材，浅暖中性肤色，淡淡雀斑，深棕色杏仁眼，柔和椭圆脸型，精致鼻梁，柔粉色嘴唇，中长深棕色层次感吹整发型，带有自然波浪，佩戴棕色复古皮质腕表"}。身着 {argument name="attire" default="暖象牙色罗纹半高领针织衫，哑光橄榄绿高腰阔腿褶皱长裤，干邑色皮带，象牙色皮质 (2/3) 运动鞋，干邑色单肩包，暖棕色圆形太阳镜，金色圆环耳饰，叠戴金色项链"}。自然站立于 {argument name="scene" default="地中海石灰岩拱门下，左手插兜，右手提包，神态放松微笑，身体侧转约 30 度，头部看向右侧。奢华庭院背景，灰泥墙面，拱门，陶瓷花瓶，蒲苇，抛光石灰岩地面，长长的建筑阴影"}。温暖的午后阳光，明亮通透的 HDR 效果，奶油色高光，暖中性色调，丰富的质感，50mm 镜头，(3/3) f/2.8 光圈，平视角度，全身可见，高端欧洲“静奢风”时尚广告大片，杂志级画质，真实的皮肤毛孔，细腻的发丝，无 CGI，无文字，无水印。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 电影感动漫黑色电影风格肖像
items.description: 生成一张充满情绪、高对比度的动漫肖像，描绘了一位戴着深色帽子、拥有青色和洋红色轮廓光的神秘女性。
items.prompt: 创作一张正方形构图的戏剧性动漫肖像，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="一位神秘的年轻女性"}，背景为漆黑的虚空。画面采用半身像，呈四分之三侧面朝向右侧，同时微微回头看向观众。她留着飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="铂金色"} 长发，带有厚重的刘海、光泽的发丝，左侧有一道发光的轮廓光。她戴着一顶宽檐深色帽子，帽子上有类似兔耳的超大延伸部分或锋利的折叠面板，身穿深色花卉图案服装，配有大朵淡青色花卉和柔和的粉色点缀。采用极端的低调照明：大部分画面被黑色阴影吞没，左侧有强烈的青蓝色背光，面部和嘴唇上有微妙的洋红色光照，眼睛、头发、帽檐、肩膀和织物上有细小而锐利的高光。表情应保持冷静、疏离且略带忧郁，双唇微张，眼睛大而精致。在她的脸部右侧黑暗中添加一个漂浮的小型青色三角形光碎片。风格设定为精致的高对比度日本动漫关键视觉图，结合绘画感的数字笔触、电影级黑色电影灯光、发光的边缘光、深邃的阴影、柔和的辉光、优雅的构图，且画面中不包含任何可见文字或水印。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 黄金时刻情侣接吻
items.description: 一张写实风格的竖版浪漫肖像，描绘了一对年轻情侣在日落时分户外接吻的场景，非常适合生活方式或情感主题的视觉呈现。
items.prompt: 创作一张写实风格的亲密特写肖像，描绘一对年轻情侣在日落时分接吻，采用 3:4 竖构图。画面左侧的男性呈侧面，戴着一顶反戴的 {argument name="man's cap color" default="黑色"} 棒球帽，帽侧带有小巧的白色标志，身穿深绿色连帽衫；他留着利落的渐变短发和修剪整齐的短胡须，双眼紧闭，温暖的肤色在黄金时刻的阳光下熠熠生辉。画面右侧的女性呈侧面，戴着一顶反戴的 {argument name="woman's cap color" default="白色"} 棒球帽，身穿一件超大款的 {argument name="woman's sweatshirt color" default="米色"} 卫衣；她留着黑色长直发，双眼紧闭，嘴唇光泽，指甲修剪整齐且呈浅色。她双手温柔地捧着男方的后颈和下颚，两人深情接吻，传递出温柔与浪漫的气息。采用浅景深效果，背景为柔和模糊的户外环境，左侧映衬着温暖的橙色夕阳余晖，伴有深琥珀色的阴影、电影级光斑、自然的皮肤纹理、逼真的衣物褶皱，营造出舒适的都市夜晚氛围。画面中除帽子上的小标志外无任何文字，无其他人物，无夸张姿势，无水印。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 极简日系杂志风肖像
items.description: 一份精致的提示词，用于生成在温馨极简日式室内空间中，东亚女性的电影感肖像，重点在于真实的皮肤细节和柔和的自然光影。
items.prompt: {argument name="subject" default="一位年轻的东亚女性"}，黑发随意盘起，留有自然的碎发。五官清晰精致，杏眼、柔和的眉毛、纤细的鼻梁，嘴唇自然水润。妆容清淡，肤色白皙温暖，皮肤保留了真实的毛孔、细小的绒毛和自然纹理，未经过度磨皮。身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="黑色细肩带挂脖上衣"}，露出颈部、锁骨和上胸部线条。构图为特写至半身肖像，主体略微偏左居中，直视镜头，目光平静沉稳，带着淡淡的微笑。右手自然抬起，手指轻触脸颊和下颌；左前臂水平放置在前景中，手部自然延伸。姿态放松优雅，不夸张。背景为 {argument name="background" default="安静的日式室内空间"}，隐约可见柔焦的障子窗或木质框架；环境极简、干净且温馨。光线为柔和的自然侧光，带有暖意；面部和肩部的光影过渡细腻，阴影柔和，高光克制。整体低饱和度、低对比度，以米色、木色、柔和的灰绿色和黑色为主。摄影风格：85mm 人像镜头，浅景深，焦点清晰对准眼睛和面部，背景柔和虚化，高端杂志肖像，真实的摄影质感，电影感但不过度风格化，照片级真实。避免：卡通感、CG 感、塑料皮肤、手指错误、手臂变形、过度锐化、浓妆、夸张的笑容、杂乱的背景、文字、水印、Logo。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.prompt: 创作一张电影感黄金时刻的人像，拍摄一位 {argument name="subject" default="成年非裔深褐色头发女性"} 坐在 {argument name="setting" default="光线昏暗的海岸列车"} 的窗边，灵感源自原始场景，但不得复制任何真实人物或身份。场景为 {argument name="interior" default="带有深哑光绿色内饰的复古海岸列车车厢"}，过道远处的乘客呈现柔和的模糊感，微小的红色信号灯以及琥珀色的暖光在金属和玻璃上反射。窗外，明亮且过曝的海岸线在午后的阳光下熠熠生辉。写实电影级编辑摄影，怀旧 35mm 胶片美学，人像比例 4:5，浅景深，脸部一侧有柔和的金色阳光，另一侧有柔和的阴影，温暖的橙色光晕，自然的胶片颗粒感，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 黄金时刻列车情绪肖像
items.description: 一个电影感提示词，用于创作一张在黄金时刻列车上，具有怀旧 35mm 胶片美感的女性肖像，光影柔和，氛围私密。
items.prompt:
一张充满情绪的黄金时刻肖像，主角是坐在 {argument name="subject" default="年轻棕发女性"} 窗边，身处 {argument name="setting" default="光线昏暗的沿海列车内"}。她转过头避开窗外掠过的风景，安静地看向镜头，神情放松而深邃。柔和的金色阳光照亮了她半边脸庞，其余部分则隐入柔和的阴影中。

列车内部呈现出 {argument name="interior color" default="深沉、柔和的绿色"}，带有微妙的复古质感。过道远处，乘客的身影显得模糊而失焦。微小的红色信号灯和温暖的琥珀色反光在车厢内点缀出精致的色彩。窗外，海岸线被刻意处理得明亮且过曝，突显了明亮外部与私密内部之间的对比。

营造一种具有怀旧 35mm 胶片美感的电影级低光氛围：厚重的有机胶片颗粒感、柔焦、高光周围温暖的橙色光晕、略微欠曝的曝光，以及永恒的复古杂志质感。构图应呈现出抓拍般的亲密感，通过浅景深和自然、真实的布光，捕捉一个安静且富有情感的瞬间。

竖构图，比例为 4:5。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 专业工作室个人形象照
items.description: 一个用于生成高分辨率专业工作室个人形象照的提示词，同时保持参考图像中人物的身份和面部结构不变。
items.prompt: 一张专业的高分辨率个人形象照，保持输入图像中人物的面部结构、身份和关键特征不变。主体采用胸部以上构图，顶部留有充足空间。人物直视镜头。整体造型为专业摄影棚拍摄风格，身着高档商务休闲装 {argument name="outfit" default="炭灰色修身西装外套"}。背景为纯色“{argument name="background color" default="#562226"}”中性摄影棚背景。采用高角度拍摄，配合 {argument name="lighting" default="明亮通透、柔和且均匀的摄影棚布光"}，柔和地照亮面部，并在眼中形成细腻的眼神光，传达出清晰感。使用 85mm f/1.8 镜头拍摄，具有浅景深效果，焦点精准聚焦于双眼，呈现出优美柔和的虚化效果。清晰展现西装面料的纹理细节、发丝质感以及自然真实的皮肤纹理。整体氛围散发出自信、专业与亲和力。画面采用干净明亮的电影级调色，色调温暖平衡，确保成片精致且具有现代感。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 东亚女性车内自拍肖像
items.description: 一个高质量的提示词，用于生成在黄金时刻车内年轻东亚女性的写实自拍，强调自然的皮肤质感和电影级光影。
items.prompt: 超写实的近距离自拍肖像，一位美丽的年轻 {argument name="ethnicity" default="东亚"} 女性坐在现代汽车内，时间为 {argument name="time of day" default="黄金时刻"}，由高端智能手机前置摄像头以手臂长度距离拍摄。她留着柔顺的 {argument name="hair color" default="深巧克力棕色"} 长发，层次感柔和，轻盈的法式刘海自然地修饰着脸型。她的皮肤白皙透亮，细腻无瑕，散发着自然的露水光泽，搭配脸颊上的玫瑰粉色腮红、精致的修容和柔和的香槟色高光。她拥有一双温暖的棕色杏仁眼，配以精致的眼线、卷翘的长睫毛和自然的浓眉，小巧精致的鼻子，以及亮泽的柔粉色嘴唇，露出明亮、整齐的洁白笑容。几缕发丝自然地垂落在额前，增添了一种随性自然的抓拍感。她穿着一件女性化的象牙白泡泡袖衬衫，带有精致的荷叶边、前襟系带细节和细腻的纹理面料。配饰包括一条带有微型花朵吊坠的细金链项链，以及一根从肩部露出的纤细金色链条斜挎包带。温暖的金色阳光从侧面车窗射入，在她的头发上形成美丽的轮廓光，在脸上投下柔和的高光和自然的阴影。模糊的背景展示了深色的车内空间，窗外是虚化的城市街道和树木，营造出电影般的焦外成像效果。构图居中，眼神直视镜头，笑容真诚愉悦，表情轻松开朗。画面呈现出干净的奢华生活方式美学，面部细节超清晰，皮肤纹理真实，色彩自然，HDR 品质，浅景深，柔和对比度，高端智能手机摄影，照片级真实，8K，编辑类美妆广告，Instagram 网红审美，随性奢华自拍，色调鲜艳而自然。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 个人品牌吉祥物头像
items.description: 为个人品牌或社交媒体资料创建精致的矢量风格半身吉祥物头像。
items.prompt: 创建一个简洁、令人印象深刻的个人品牌吉祥物/头像插图，内容为 {argument name="character description" default="一位年轻的黑人男性，拥有温暖的中棕色皮肤，留着整洁渐变短发，椭圆形脸庞，深棕色杏仁眼，浓眉，宽鼻，丰满的嘴唇，带着自信而平静的微笑"}。展示一个居中的半身像，正面朝向，面部比例对称，具有可辨识的肖像特征。采用精致的矢量吉祥物风格，配以平滑的赛璐珞阴影、清晰的黑色线条、额头、鼻子、脸颊和嘴唇上的光泽高光，以及温暖的橙棕色皮肤阴影。角色穿着 {argument name="shirt color" default="一件深炭灰色圆领 T 恤"}。将半身像置于纯黑色背景上，不含任何文字、标志或多余物体。在整个轮廓周围添加粗体贴纸风格的描边：一个厚实的黑色外轮廓，加上一个沿着头部、耳朵、颈部、肩部和衬衫形状的鲜艳 {argument name="accent outline color" default="洋红色-紫色"} 发光/轮廓线。构图应为正方形，像社交媒体头像一样紧凑裁剪，居中，高对比度，具备专业的电子竞技/品牌吉祥物质量，边缘清晰，背景简洁，且非写实风格。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 电影感蓝色火焰肖像
items.description: 一个令人惊叹的写实风格提示词，用于生成人物手持燃烧着蓝色火焰的报纸的图像，具有电影级光影和细腻的纹理。
items.prompt: 一个人站在黑色背景前。此人手持一份标有“{argument name="headline" default="LATEST NEWS"}”的报纸，报纸一角正在燃烧，伴有 {argument name="flame color" default="blue"} 色火焰和淡淡的烟雾轨迹。火焰应具有风格化且视觉冲击力强。人物身上的光影应呈现出电影般的忧郁感，主要由蓝色火焰提供光源，在面部和手上投射出蓝色的高光与阴影。主体应穿着 {argument name="clothing" default="黑色衬衫"} 并佩戴叠层银链，展现出大胆、现代的风格。当人物低头看着燃烧的报纸时，表情应显得严肃且沉思。整体氛围应紧张而神秘。请将面部替换为上传照片中的人物，并真实地匹配光影、肤色和透视效果。保持图像的高质量和写实感。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 猫耳和服少女
items.description: 一个精细的动漫提示词，用于生成一位躺在樱花丛中、身着酒红色花卉和服的优雅猫耳少女。
items.prompt: 创作一张高度精细的动漫插画，画中有一位名为 {argument name="character name" default="Miu"} 的猫耳少女，她以优雅的侧卧姿势趴在地上，单手托腮，用明亮的 {argument name="eye color" default="青蓝色"} 双眼温柔地注视着观众。她拥有极长的飘逸 {argument name="hair color" default="银白色"} 秀发，发丝散落在地板上，留着直刘海，头顶一对硕大蓬松的白猫耳，佩戴一个金心酒红色花朵发饰、一枚小型酒红色 X 形发夹、小巧耳环以及配套的花朵颈圈。为她穿上一件华丽的 {argument name="kimono color" default="深酒红色"} 哥特洛丽塔风格和服，配有宽袖、精致的白色花卉刺绣、蕾丝花边、层叠的荷叶边裙摆、背后的图案蝴蝶结、黑色内领细节以及精致的半透明蕾丝装饰。展示她弯曲向上抬起的裸露双腿，右上方可见双脚。背景为淡雅的日式花卉装饰，点缀着樱花枝、散落的花瓣与花朵、酒红色新月图案、淡淡的格纹质感、精致纤细的矩形蕾丝边框，以及倒映着袖子、头发和花朵的亮面反射地板。采用酒红、白、淡粉和灰色的柔和色调，线条干净利落，高光通透，阴影细腻，呈现出优雅梦幻的 AI 动漫艺术风格。画面中必须包含以下重复元素：一名少女、两只猫耳、两只抬起的裸足、头部/颈部区域的三个主要酒红色配饰、一个新月符号、多枝樱花及散落的花瓣。在右下角添加一个手写签名 {argument name="signature text" default="ausa days"}，并附带一个小小的爪印。画面中不应出现多余角色、现代物品，除小签名外不得有任何水印。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 电光蓝妖怪女性肖像
items.description: 一个电影感动漫肖像提示词，用于创作一位拥有白发、身着和服、带有闪电纹理且充满暗黑超自然氛围的发光风暴精灵女性。
items.prompt: 创作一张单格竖版动漫风格肖像，主角为 {argument name="character name" default="一位神秘的妖怪女性"}，展示胸部以上部位，呈左侧侧面视角，头部微微向上倾斜，表情冷静而疏离。她留着发光的纯白头发，扎成松散的低发髻，带有凌乱的刘海和像过曝灯光一样发光的碎发；一根深色发簪横向穿过发髻，并挂着一条带有流苏的小链子。她的皮肤和长袍呈深电光蓝色，布满了风暴云纹理和分叉的白色闪电脉络，仿佛她的身体是由活生生的雷暴构成。她身穿带有浅色领口和层叠褶皱的传统和服，布料融入了云朵斑块和闪电条纹。使用强烈的青蓝色轮廓光勾勒出整个剪影，与近乎黑色的炭灰色背景形成高对比度。构图略微偏右，脸部位于左侧三分之一处，明亮的头发占据右上角。风格：电影感日本动漫插画、空灵的超自然反派气质、柔和的绘画边缘、发光晕影、体积光、精致的线条、戏剧性的黑暗感，无额外角色，除右上角可选的微小艺术家签名式涂鸦外，无任何可读文字。调色板应为黑色、电光蓝、青色和纯白色。让画面呈现出一种受 {argument name="mood reference" default="冷峻优雅的蜘蛛侠反派氛围"} 启发的绝美雷电精灵之感。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.rawText: 创作一张单格竖版动漫风格肖像，主角为 {argument name="character name" default="一位神秘的妖怪女性"}，展示胸部以上部位，呈左侧侧面视角，头部微微向上倾斜，表情冷静而疏离。她留着发光的纯白头发，扎成松散的低发髻，带有凌乱的刘海和像过曝灯光一样发光的碎发；一根深色发簪横向穿过发髻，并挂着一条带有流苏的小链子。她的皮肤和长袍呈深电光蓝色，布满了风暴云纹理和分叉的白色闪电脉络，仿佛她的身体是由活生生的雷暴构成。她身穿带有浅色领口和层叠褶皱的传统和服，布料融入了云朵斑块和闪电条纹。使用强烈的青蓝色轮廓光勾勒出整个剪影，与近乎黑色的炭灰色背景形成高对比度。构图略微偏右，脸部位于左侧三分之一处，明亮的头发占据右上角。风格：电影感日本动漫插画、空灵的超自然反派气质、柔和的绘画边缘、发光晕影、体积光、精致的线条、戏剧性的黑暗感，无额外角色，除右上角可选的微小艺术家签名式涂鸦外，无任何可读文字。调色板应为黑色、电光蓝、青色和纯白色。让画面呈现出一种受 {argument name="mood reference" default="冷峻优雅的蜘蛛侠反派氛围"} 启发的绝美雷电精灵之感。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 超写实豪华汽车自拍
items.description: 一份用于在黄金时刻生成豪华汽车内高保真自拍肖像的综合提示词，强调面部一致性和写实的摄影细节。
items.prompt:
使用随附的参考图像作为 {argument name="identity reference" default="身份参考"}，创建一张超写实的图像。确保主体与参考图像中的人物高度相似，保留相同的面部特征、面部比例、肤色和整体相似度。保持面部完全自然，不进行美颜、重塑或改变任何面部特征。不要有鼻环。

低角度特写自拍 {argument name="location" default="在豪华汽车内"}，身体略微朝向镜头，右臂自然伸出进行拍摄，头部微微倾斜。

柔顺的深棕色中分直发，极简自然妆容，亮面粉色嘴唇，{argument name="outfit" default="黑色吊带背心"}，左肩斜跨深色安全带，纤细的黑色猫眼太阳镜，精致的金色项链配有小圆形水晶吊坠，吊坠上方有一个微小的轮廓心形纹身。

豪华汽车内饰，全景天窗外可见明亮的蓝天。强烈的黄金时刻阳光营造出极具电影感的对比，面部洒满暖光，车厢内部呈现深邃阴影。

使用 Sony A7R V 拍摄，35mm f/1.4 镜头，自然的广角自拍视角，主体焦点清晰，背景虚化柔和，超写实皮肤纹理，高端杂志摄影风格，细节极其丰富。

负面提示词：低质量，模糊，平淡光线，面部扭曲，身份偏移，面部特征改变，多余肢体，卡通，动漫，CGI，塑料感皮肤，水印，标志，文字，鼻环。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 樱花浴衣偶像肖像
items.description: 生成一张在粉色樱花灯笼摄影棚内的日本偶像全身肖像，非常适合用于 Cosplay、偶像或季节性节日视觉素材。
items.prompt: 创作一张全身、竖构图的摄影棚肖像，展现一位可爱的年轻日本偶像女性，置身于浪漫的节日浴衣场景中。她居中站立，面对镜头，面带温柔微笑，拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤、明亮柔和的双眼、棕色直刘海以及高扎的棕色双马尾；头上戴着一个黑色大蝴蝶结发箍。她身穿一件黑色浴衣，上面带有粉色格纹线条和巨大的粉色玫瑰印花，袖口宽大，腰间系着淡粉色腰带，并配有层叠的黑色蕾丝带和小爱心装饰，戴着黑色蕾丝露指手套，脚穿黑色厚底靴。她的姿势俏皮且对称，双手举在脸颊旁，模仿猫爪动作。背景为室内日本春季节日摄影棚，配有木质障子门屏风，顶部和两侧装饰着茂密的垂挂樱花枝和粉色花瓣，灯光温暖的纸灯笼，右侧斜靠着一把带有红色花卉装饰的纸伞。画面中需包含 5 个清晰可见的灯笼：左上方 1 个高大的椭圆形吊灯，右上方 1 个高大的椭圆形吊灯，左下角 1 个大型圆形地灯，左下方中心附近 1 个小型圆形地灯，以及右下角 1 个中型圆形地灯。采用温暖的桃粉色调灯光，呈现柔和的焦外成像效果，地面为抛光的深色木地板，散落着樱花花瓣，高细节时尚摄影风格，干净的偶像肖像修图，真实的布料质感，无文字，无水印。可自定义细节：{argument name="character name" default="Sayaka"}，{argument name="yukata pattern" default="黑色格纹浴衣配大粉色玫瑰"}，{argument name="hair style" default="棕色双马尾配直刘海和黑色蝴蝶结"}，{argument name="background theme" default="粉色樱花日本灯笼摄影棚"}，{argument name="pose" default="戴着蕾丝手套的双手举在脸颊旁模仿猫爪"}。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 写实风格餐厅手机人像
items.description: 生成一张写实风格、手持手机视角的餐厅女性照片，采用广角镜头效果和自然光照明，以减少 AI 生成的痕迹。
items.prompt: 一张竖构图的餐厅手机抓拍人像，主角为一位 {argument name="age" default="年轻的东亚女性"}，身材苗条匀称，肤色呈暖白色自然质感，精致的鹅蛋脸，深棕色杏仁眼，柔和的自然眉形，眼线清晰但不浓重，睫毛纤细，鼻梁小巧挺直，淡珊瑚红色嘴唇，嘴角微微上扬，露出放松自然的微笑。黑色长发，部分发丝垂在肩前。佩戴小巧耳环，身穿一件 {argument name="top" default="银色亮片白色挂脖迷你裙上衣"}，点缀着细小亮片，颈间佩戴一条极细的银色项链。坐在暖光餐厅的深棕色皮质卡座中，面向镜头，身体微微前倾，左肘撑在桌上，左手托腮，右前臂搁在桌沿，直视镜头，表情柔和放松。双腿自然地从桌下伸向摄影师方向，双脚交叠并搁在摄影师的膝盖上（穿着深灰色长裤）。脚趾放松，涂着 {argument name="nail art" default="Hello Kitty 图案"} 的脚趾甲油，边缘有轻微磨损和不均匀感。桌上摆放着一大盘蘑菇、几个黑色陶瓷碗、深色蘸料、木质筷子、小杯子以及一盘切好的肉。背景为深棕色皮质卡座、木质餐桌、粗糙的灰色水泥质感墙面、黑色天花板以及几根垂直的铜色烧烤排烟管。主体位于画面中心，头部位于上方三分之一处，餐桌横跨画面中部。从桌下的双脚到画面底部摄影师的膝盖呈现长焦透视感。3:4 比例，手机主摄近景拍摄，位置略低于视线并向下倾斜。24–28mm 等效广角镜头，使前景的脚部和膝盖显得较大，上半身较小，模拟真实的手机透视效果。线条有轻微的广角畸变。中等景深的自然虚化；面部、餐具和前景的脚部清晰，远处的卡座和管道略微柔化。没有使用人像模式抠图或夸张的背景虚化。混合照明，来自暖白色射灯和吊灯；面部由前上方柔和的暖光照亮。前额、鼻梁、脸颊和肩膀有高光。背景和桌下区域较暗。铜管和油润的木桌上有暖色反光。中等对比度。色调为暖棕色、铜色、黑灰色、珍珠白、暖肤色和鲜绿色。自动白平衡略偏暖。呈现真实的皮肤毛孔、轻微的肤色不均、手臂关节纹理、自然的足部质感，以及木材、皮革、金属、陶瓷和生菜的纹理。具备标准 Android 旗舰机或 iPhone 主摄的画质。手持拍摄，计算摄影自动曝光，多帧夜景模式合成。轻微的自动 HDR 降低了高光眩光并提亮了桌下阴影。动态范围有限，阴影处有细微的高 ISO 噪点。降噪处理带来细微的纹理涂抹感。面部和餐具边缘有克制的数字锐化。前景清晰，远处细节略微柔和。有轻微的 JPEG 压缩痕迹。自然的构图偏差。无磨皮，无美颜滤镜，无商业修图，无影棚布光，不追求 8K 超高清画质。真实生活中的手机照片，去除 AI 生成感，比例 4:5。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 个人资料 / 头像 - 黄金时刻火车旅行人像
items.description: 一张极具电影感的黄金时刻人像，描绘了一位坐在行驶火车内的女性，身穿针织毛衣，伴有温暖阳光与胶片颗粒质感。
items.prompt: 极具电影感的黄金时刻人像，描绘了一位 {argument name="subject" default="美丽的年轻女性"} 坐在行驶火车内的窗边，身穿一件 {argument name="outfit" default="炭灰色廓形针织毛衣"}，长发自然凌乱，被温暖的阳光照亮，表情柔和放松，带着淡淡的微笑，纪实生活摄影风格。浓郁的黄金时刻阳光透过火车窗户倾泻而入，在她的脸庞和发丝上勾勒出柔和的高光，而车厢则沉浸在深邃的电影感阴影中。复古火车内饰，背景中的乘客呈现柔和的模糊效果，头顶的实用灯光发出暖光，氛围梦幻，带有细微的窗户倒影，浅景深，奶油般虚化效果，真实的皮肤纹理，自然的瑕疵，柔和的光晕，{argument name="film aesthetic" default="Kodak Portra 400 胶片美学"}，柔和的大地色调，细腻的胶片颗粒，真实的旅行氛围，充满叙事感的构图，Leica M11，50mm Summilux f/1.4，f/1.4，HDR，超写实，时尚杂志摄影，获奖旅行人像，8K。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 电影感东方光影肖像
items.description: 一个用于高对比度电影感肖像的精致提示词，以日本和服与折扇为特色，运用戏剧性的明暗对照法照明。
items.prompt: [人物] 图像 1 [签名] 右下角有一个由 Meta 运营的小型 Threads 标志，其上方用白色草书小字写着“CHAse”作为签名。[姿势与表情] 姿势与构图：居中的半身像，感性地捕捉了上半身、右肩线条以及手中折扇的轮廓。姿势：穿着自然垂落的服装露出右肩，左手持一把完全展开的黑色折扇，略微遮住脸部左侧。上半身和头部微微倾斜，以突显纤细的颈部和锁骨。表情：目光静止，冷漠地看向左下方，而非直视前方。克制的唇形和冷静的神态营造出一种如同经典东方画报场景般迷人而神秘的氛围。[服装与道具] 服装：穿着一件厚重的深黑色东方和服/浴衣长袍，上面精致地绣有绚烂的纯白色菊花和梅花图案。展现出大胆露出一侧肩膀的时髦造型。道具：黑色折扇：左手持一把带有细密竹骨细节的哑光黑色折扇，与人物面部形成如同水墨画般的对比。指甲细节：长而修剪尖锐的指甲上，点缀着淡淡闪烁的白金尖端美甲，增添了视觉上的精致感。[发型与妆容细节] 发型：头顶上方高扎的半扎发造型。从发缝处自然垂落在双颊旁的深黑色细碎发丝掠过肌肤，营造出梦幻般的素描效果。妆容：打造出半哑光的瓷肌底妆，高光与阴影平滑融合。眼妆搭配精致的黑色猫眼眼线，眼角微微上扬并带有深邃的阴影，唇妆则选用冷静的裸色干枯玫瑰（砖红色）哑光唇釉，提升自然气色。[光影与指导] 光源：强烈的定向聚光灯（主光）以琥珀色/金橙色调从人物右上方（画面左侧）强烈而温暖地照射。效果：运用明暗对照法，在脸部左侧、肩线以及光线强烈照射的背景部分形成强烈而温暖的光影高光，而未受光照的右侧则陷入深邃迷人的阴影中，营造出戏剧性的立体感。[质感与色彩氛围（核心质感细节）] 色彩：“电影感东方光影”色彩氛围，受光区域的暖金色、背景中调低的深橄榄卡其/棕色，以及服装和折扇的绝对深黑色（喷气黑）与刺绣的雪白色交织。质感细节（特别分析）：织物质感：丝棉混纺长袍保持哑光的同时，能感受到每一根绣线的立体纹理。道具质感：折扇纸面/竹骨的规律间距与凹陷阴影纹理。皮肤与光泽质感：聚光灯照射在如瓷器般平滑但剔除人工光泽的哑光皮肤上，呈现出柔软的皮肤质感和发丝的锐利韵律。颗粒噪点：遍布画面的精细高分辨率模拟胶片颗粒噪点，与如同天鹅绒墙面般的背景石膏质感融合，呈现出油画般的质感。[胶片与相机镜头景深、角度] 构图与角度：水平构图，从接近主体视平线的位置水平捕捉人物印象和东方物件，无畸变。特性：应用了顶级人像镜头极浅的景深（Shallow DoF）。焦点如刀锋般精准地落在人物左眼、脸部轮廓以及手中折扇的扇骨细节上，而光线斜射的后方纹理墙面以及右肩后的背景则被柔和地虚化（背景虚化），以最大化沉浸感。[背景与摄影棚布局元素] 空间：一个能感受到岁月痕迹的复古且色调低沉的摄影棚背景。细节：人物后方是一面深橄榄棕色的精细石膏/石材纹理墙，从左侧射入的光线在墙面一侧留下了对角渐变高光，即使是留白空间也赋予了画报般的深度。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。

items.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 空灵湖畔时尚摄影
items.description: 一个为 gpt-image-2 设计的梦幻时尚提示词，描绘了一位身着粉色雪纺裙的女性，置身于垂柳依依、光影柔和浪漫的宁静湖畔。
items.prompt: 描绘 {argument name="person" default="一位 21 岁以上的东亚成年女性"} 站在宁静的湖边，周围有垂柳环绕。她位于画面中心偏右侧，取景范围从大腿上部到头部，身体略微转向观众，脸部向左下方倾斜，呈现出宁静而内省的姿态。她的表情柔和、平静且富有诗意，双眼微垂，双唇放松，画着精致的眼线，睫毛修长，皮肤光滑透亮，带有淡淡的桃色腮红，唇色为柔和的玫瑰裸色。她留着黑色长卷发，自然中分，垂落在肩头和背部。头发质感蓬松柔软，微风拂过，在柔和的阳光下泛着微光。她佩戴着一对精致的小型绿松石耳坠，增添了一抹优雅。她身着 {argument name="dress" default="一件飘逸的浅粉色雪纺长裙"}，采用露肩设计，配有轻盈的薄纱袖和半透明的裙摆。胸部采用柔和的褶皱设计，配以心形领口和中心抓褶，营造出优雅的胸部纹理。腰部中心有巧妙的镂空设计，裙身由层叠的雪纺面料包裹，带有高开叉，在柔软的褶皱间隐约露出腿部。整件礼服应显得轻盈、空灵且浪漫，仿佛在微风中自然舞动。场景为 {argument name="setting" default="梦幻般的湖畔花园"}，垂柳的枝叶在画面顶部和左侧形成框架。她身后是柔和朦胧的绿色湖面、雾气缭绕的植被，以及透过树梢洒下的微弱阳光。背景应营造出郁郁葱葱、宁静如画的氛围，并带有柔和的焦外成像和淡淡的薄雾。光线应为来自右上方的柔和自然光，透过叶片散射，在她的脸部、锁骨、肩膀、头发、耳坠和粉色雪纺面料上形成明亮的高光。在头发和薄纱袖周围增加柔和的轮廓光，搭配奶油般的阴影和粉绿色调。使用逼真的皮肤纹理、细腻的头发细节、轻盈的雪纺薄纱、飘逸的面料、浅景深，以及精致浪漫的时尚杂志风格。风格：写实湖畔时尚摄影，成年模特，浅粉色薄纱裙，露肩垂坠袖，柳枝，宁静湖泊背景，柔和浪漫阳光，诗意的低头凝视，空灵的女性美，高细节，竖构图，无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无其他角色，无畸形解剖结构，非卡通风格，无强闪光，无杂乱，无裸露。
items.negativePrompt: 遵循原提示词中的避免项；不要水印、乱码、低清、畸形手、错误透视或主体漂移。
